message:
feat(tui): implement pattern search filtering

- Add active_filter field to BuildTui for persistent search
- Enter in search mode applies filter to pattern list
- Escape outside search mode clears the filter
- Case-insensitive substring matching on pattern text
- Status message shows current filter state
- Selection resets to first item when filter changes

Closes: meta_skill-iz85

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
